positive: A mystical forest creature, an ethereal fox spirit, sitting peacefully amidst glowing bioluminescent flora and glowing crystal formations. The fox should have a sleek, stylized silhouette and deep, vibrant autumnal colors (burnt orange, sapphire blue, emerald green). The composition should be centered, emphasizing the creature's graceful posture against a dark, moody background. Studio art style, high contrast, volumetric lighting, intricate line work, perfect symmetry, designed for seamless repeat print on textiles. Minimalist gothic fantasy aesthetic, detailed vector illustration, UHD, highly detailed, concept art.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermarks, signature, logo, messy, amateur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grain, noise, out of frame, cartoonish, photorealistic
